# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type

- [ ] fix
- [ ] feat
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore / refactor
- [ ] security hardening

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (or explain why not)
- [ ] New/changed behavior has tests when practical
- [ ] Docs updated (`README`, `INSTALL`, `CHANGELOG` as needed)
- [ ] No secrets, absolute personal paths, or private challenge artifacts
- [ ] Tools follow path confinement / `safeExec` patterns when touching filesystem or processes

## Test plan

<!-- Commands you ran, install profile tested, etc. -->

```bash
npm run check
# optional
npm run pack:check
```

## Notes for reviewers
